about: Central Iowa's premier membership-only lifestyle club founded in 2017, featuring over 6,500 sq ft of adult entertainment with private rooms, a dungeon, dance floor, hot tub, and pool. BYOB establishment hosting themed parties every weekend.

A community-driven lifestyle group built on connection, respect, and unforgettable experiences in Des Moines. They create elevated, themed events including hotel takeovers and mix & mingles for open-minded adults in a safe, drama-free environment.
